content.en:
After the Mad Monkey Son came to power, he didn't talk nonsense and attacked directly.

He didn't want to waste time, he wanted to defeat Ye Tian as soon as possible and get the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance.

In terms of strength, the Mad Monkey Saint Son is also a heavy overlimiter, but he is the top one overlimiter, and many of the top powerhouses are a top overlimiter, except for the top 100, the gap behind is not big.

The Mad Monkey Holy Son urged the Golden Monkey Holy Body, and the whole person turned into a golden monkey, his eyes were blood-red, full of rage.

I saw the mad monkey saint son holding a stick and directly picked it up.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Mad Monkey Holy Son.

In terms of true strength, Ye Tian was afraid that he was close enough to be very close to the Triple Overlimiter, because he was enough to match the top Domain Ancestor in the Realm, but the Top Domain Ancestor in the Realm was actually inferior to the Triple Overlimiter.

The Triple Overlimit has the ability to kill the weaker top domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, which means that they can easily kill the top domain ancestors in the realm, while Ye Tian can only match the top domain ancestors in the realm, and there is no way to do it easily.

According to Ye Tian's judgment, his real strength should be at the limit level of the double overlimiter, it is not difficult to kill the average double overlimiter, and killing an overlimit person like the Mad Monkey Holy Son is also a matter of one move.

But this time, he was not prepared to expose the Eternal Immortal Holy Body and the Golden Silk of the Holy Technique, so his strength was very limited.

If only the Dacheng-level Mixed Yuan Holy Body and the power of the Extreme Dao were exposed, Ye Tian would probably be able to exert the strength of the weaker Double Overlimiter.

But even so, it is enough to enter the top 100 of the list.

Ye Tian still didn't show the strength of the double overlimiter, and at first he only fought with the Mad Monkey Saint Son for a while.

After feeling the same, he burst out with the strength of infinitely close to the double transcendent, and after the final battle, he smashed the body of the Mad Monkey Saint Son and won the battle.

"Damn it!"

The Mad Monkey Son was furious.

He didn't expect that he would lose, and with his own failure, Ye Tian stepped into the ranks of the first list.

Next, another strong man on the Unified List challenged Ye Tian, and the opponent was at 283rd on the Unified List, and his strength was much stronger than that of the Mad Monkey Holy Son, but he still did not reach the combat power of the double overlimiter.

After a hard battle, Ye Tian defeated the other party.

With the arrival of a strong man on the first list, they failed to challenge Ye Tian.

In the end, Ye Tian still showed the combat power of the double overlimiter, which shocked the audience.

"Oh my God, how long has it been since the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws entered the Unified Realm, and he actually has the combat power of a double superlimiter, if he is allowed to cultivate for another period of time, wouldn't he be sure to hit the top ten?"

"It's not just the top ten, maybe there's hope to hit the first place!"

"It would be an exaggeration to say that the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws has hit the first, and the top ten on the Guiyi List are also the people of the Top Ten Holy Gates, and they are all extremely demonic, and they have been famous for countless years, although it is not clear why they have stayed in the Guiyi Realm and have not broken through, but the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws wants to catch up with them, it is difficult!"

"That's right, the top ten on the Unified One List are basically the top two over-limiters combat power, and even very close to the triple over-limiters, I don't know how many demon geniuses claim to surpass them, but in the end, Ye just barely entered the ranks of the Unified One List!"

......

After Ye Tian showed the combat power of the double superlimiter, the Battle Realm Tower rated Ye Tian as the 100th place on the Unified List, this ranking is also very reasonable, no one has meaning, although the previous 100th place may be meaningful, but the other party probably doesn't pay attention to this so-called ranking, and doesn't know where it is in the Dark Sanctuary!

And after Ye Tian entered the top 100 of the Unified List, there was a mysterious void somewhere in the Battle Realm Tower, and a domain ancestor was observing.

In the Battle Realm Tower, the number of layers where the Domain Ancestor is located is different from the half-step Domain Ancestor, but some Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate have a way to spy on the situation of the Dou Zhan Tai, which is also a tacit matter.

But for the independent space, they can't snoop around, otherwise the major holy gates will not agree to use the Battle Boundary Tower as a public battle tower, and they will not send so many members into the battle tower.

The domain ancestors of these battle gates are basically invincible domain ancestors, and among them are the Blood Gang Domain Ancestors, and they are all high-level leaders of the Holy Gate.

At this moment, they were chatting about Ye Tian.

"The strength of the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws has improved rapidly, and his Eternal Immortal Holy Body should have been completed, there is no doubt about this, after all, we have given him so many Holy Body Fruits, and it is normal to break through. If he unleashes the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, his strength should be able to exert the combat power of a mid-to-high dual transcendent!"

"This strength is still not enough, we must raise his cultivation to the realm of perfection of the Unified Realm, find a way to let him practice one or two more domain techniques, and then raise the domain techniques to the realm of Xiaocheng or above, or even the realm of Dacheng, so that he can have the top double unrestricted combat power. "

"At present, our battle gate only has one top-level double overlimit combat power, which is considered the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, and has eight overlimit combat power, but this strength is not enough, and we can't get good results after the holy war in 5 million years!"

"It is said that several other holy gates are also making every effort to cultivate double overlimiters, and there may even be demons born that are infinitely close to those of triple overlimiters, in that case, our battle gate will have no advantage!"

"It's a pity that the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws appeared too late, otherwise we would be sure to cultivate him into a twofold extreme overlimiter, or even a triple overlimiter, it is not without a glimmer of hope!"

"Are you sure if there are any Saints involved this time?"

"I can't inquire, the Holy War is coming, the major holy gates are strictly keeping the situation of geniuses secret, and even the top 100 people on the list are not allowed to enter the Battle Realm Tower, for fear that we will learn about the specific strength, so there is no way to spy on the specific information!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, you go and communicate with the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, tell him about the situation of the holy war, let him be prepared, and improve his strength at all costs. If he has a request, he can ask for it, and we will try to accommodate it. As long as he can get good results in the holy war, we will train him at all costs!"

"Okay, I'll talk to him!"

......

"The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor is looking for me?"

Ye Tian received a message from the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, so he came to the War Domain Realm.

Soon, he met the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said hello.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, this time I came to you about the Holy War!" "The Bloody Domain Ancestor said: "The next Holy War is positioned 5 million years later, and the venue is in the War Realm Tower, because the War Realm Tower can restrict treasures such as secret treasures, only rely on real strength, and it doesn't matter if you die in battle." So, this is the most suitable place for jihad. And we need your participation in the battle gate!"

"What is jihad?"

Ye Tian wondered.

He had never heard of jihad, so he knew nothing about it.
